Cursor Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

An AI-first code editor built around chat, autocomplete, and codebase-aware edits.

MakerAnysphere
CategoryAI Coding Assistants
PricingFree (Hobby) tier available; Pro from $20/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit Cursor →

Best for

Developers building full projects with heavy AI assistance.

Pros

  • Deep codebase-aware chat and multi-file editing
  • Fast, high-quality autocomplete
  • Popular among professional developers for full projects

Cons

  • Free tier has limited premium model requests
  • Separate editor to install rather than an extension

Alternatives to Cursor

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

GitHub Copilot

AI pair programmer that autocompletes and explains code inside your editor.

AI Tool Finder — independent AI tool reviews and comparisons. Some links may be affiliate links, at no extra cost to you.
